column1: T1,"Create Event Ledger foundation","Introduce unified Event Ledger types/schemas and server storage at .fabric/events.jsonl. Add constants, append/read helpers, stable event envelope, typed event discriminators for existing ledger/audit concepts, and correlation/session id fields where appropriate. Do not migrate callers yet except tests for the new service.","Unit tests for event schema parse, append/read JSONL, malformed-line tolerance, and .fabric/events.jsonl path constant.","New Event Ledger service writes and reads .fabric/events.jsonl
column3: typed events cover rule_context_planned, rule_selection, rule_sections_fetched, edit_intent_checked, rule_drift_detected, rule_baseline_accepted, mcp_event
column5: packages/server/src/services/**","Use existing ledger-entry/audit-log schema style and read-ledger JSONL tolerance patterns || packages/shared/src/schemas/ledger-entry.ts
column10: E2","1","[Explore event-ledger-storage] Current storage is dual JSONL: .fabric/.intent-ledger.jsonl plus legacy fallback for LedgerEntry, and .fabric/audit.jsonl for get_rules/edit_intent/rule_selection. HTTP MCP EventStore also writes kind=mcp-event lines into the ledger file. /api/ledger and history replay consume readLedger
column11: /events watches ledger/meta/lock/forensic, not audit. Migration needs .fabric/events.jsonl plus compatibility projections for ledger views, audit compliance windows, MCP replay, and SSE semantics.

column1: [Explore mcp-instrumentation] MCP registration is split across packages/server/src/tools/* and calls services directly. Existing writes are service-local: getRules appends get_rules audit, getRuleSections appends rule_selection, appendIntent writes ledger then edit_intent audit
column2: planContext is readOnlyHint true but has no event write, updateRegistry has none. Implement shared recordEvent for .fabric/events.jsonl and instrument plan_context_requested, rule_sections_selected, intent_recorded/edit_intent_checked, deprecated tool usage with correlation/session ids.
